scene: A night storm has thrown three merchantmen against the moles of Lacydon harbor. Crews are dragging cargo from the surf.

choices.label: Join the salvage line
choices.resultText: Soaked to the bone, but the dockmen know your name now.

choices.label: Buy ruined cargo for a pittance
choices.resultText: Salt-stained amphorae, bought cheap, sold quietly.

scene: Word spreads of fever in the Ligurian quarter. Some say it came off a Punic ship.

choices.label: Speak against the panic in the agora
choices.resultText: Your level words cool hot heads.

choices.label: Blame the foreigners loudly
choices.resultText: The crowd roars approval. The quarter remembers.

scene: A Gaulish caravan from the Rhone valley arrives with amber, hides, and a chieftain's son eager to see the famous polis.

choices.label: Host the chieftain's son
choices.resultText: He leaves with gifts and good stories about you.

choices.label: Just trade and send them on
choices.resultText: Fair prices, no entanglements.

scene: The festival of Artemis fills the streets. The procession passes your door.

choices.label: March with an offering
choices.resultText: Incense, hymns, and the goddess's calm.

choices.label: Work through it
choices.resultText: The city sings; your ledger grows.

scene: Fire breaks out among the agora stalls before dawn. Smoke towers over the city.

choices.label: Lead a bucket chain
choices.resultText: Scorched sleeves, saved stalls, grateful merchants.

choices.label: Protect only your own interests
choices.resultText: Yours survived. Others noticed whose did not.

scene: A man with a Punic accent has been asking detailed questions about harbor depths and grain stores.

choices.label: Report him to the Ephors
choices.resultText: He vanishes before the guards arrive, but your vigilance is noted.

choices.label: Sell him harmless half-truths
choices.resultText: Carthaginian silver spends like any other. If no one learns.

scene: A raided Ligurian village sends families to Massalia's gates seeking shelter.

choices.label: Argue to admit them
choices.resultText: They camp inside the wooden wall. Some citizens grumble.

choices.label: Argue the city is for citizens
choices.resultText: The gates stay watched. The old families nod.

scene: A comet hangs over the gulf for three nights. The city argues about what it means.

choices.label: Declare it an omen demanding sacrifice
choices.resultText: The altars smoke. The sky, eventually, clears.

choices.label: Argue it is a natural wonder
choices.resultText: Some call you wise. The priests call you something else.

scene: A bad pressing in the chora means wine prices triple. Symposia are getting desperate.

choices.label: Open your stores to friends
choices.resultText: Your name is toasted in every andron this month.

choices.label: Sell at the new price
choices.resultText: Excellent margins. Cooler greetings.

scene: A wandering sophist from Syracuse offers public lessons in argument - for a fee.

choices.label: Pay for a private session
choices.resultText: Expensive. Worth it. Probably.

choices.label: Debate him publicly for free
choices.resultText: You hold your own. The crowd keeps score.
